anomaly_agent.finding: Transaction patterns and amount (1250.0 INR) align with 7-day average baseline (1180.5 INR).

behavioral_agent.finding: Elevated device risk score (12.5) and shared device mule count (1) detected.

network_agent.finding: Direct graph connection to entity with active sanction linkage.

compliance_agent.finding: Sanctions risk and potential AML violations flagged due to underlying entity matching.

orchestration_failure_log.root_cause_analysis: The final execution layer executed the standard behavioral route approval instead of triggering a hard-stop override. High-severity compliance alerts (>= 0.70) failed to intercept the low-risk anomaly classifier.

remediation_protocol.description: Intercept settlement process to manually freeze funds.
Place a temporary regulatory hold on the originating account for full due diligence.
Deploy emergency override rule ensuring any agent reporting risk >= 0.70 triggers an immediate REJECT.
